planets.name: Art

artifacts.title: Art receipt from 2025-04-11
artifacts.excerpt:
Here is a public thank you to @pickover whose book "Artificial Intelligence" was the best condensed reading material I have read since January of this year. 

The printed book allows a textual and visually illustrated approach to understanding and learning its time-based content. https://t.co/YrH7WdG6zP

The first prototype marks an active collaboration between https://t.co/K9z3juFbtD and https://t.co/qqKhUqQgnd.

2 of the best web3 companies are joining their individual strength/talent in favor of on-chain innovation. https://t.co/6JijzieuQV https://t.co/r9b0JmaM3E

planets.name: Collection

artifacts.title: Collection receipt from 2023-05-09
artifacts.excerpt:
I'd nominate @zapper_fi mobile app to any top-notch web3 experience prize.

As a user, when browsing to a collection's page, I can easily find out who else owns an NFT among the accounts that I follow; e.g: from @calladita collection. The menu is rich in social features also. 💯 https://t.co/NcxBa9Y4Od

artifacts.excerpt:

Good luck and steady progress. ❤️ https://t.co/6uw7tc2jNp

artifacts.title: Eth receipt from 2022-05-16
artifacts.excerpt:
@JulyTheGinny Best if you mint the song as a standalone NFT by using your ETH wallet address. Then, same address mints the whole album. 

Reach out to the team @manifoldxyz, they're helpful to emerging artists. By minting from their platform, you can list your songs on many NFT platforms.

artifacts.title: Ethereum receipt from 2023-05-04
artifacts.excerpt:
I've just voted YES on four proposals, as a delegate, in the Optimism DAO (@OptimismGov). 

Frictionless onchain voting through @tallyxyz, processed on the Optimism blockchain (Ethereum's Layer 2) @optimismFND. 

Self-delegation and governance participation since Feb 24, 2023. https://t.co/fKynB5ppXt

artifacts.title: Ethereum receipt from 2024-02-13
artifacts.excerpt:
For a second round of praise, I am impressed with the current look and feel of @zapper_fi. 
It works well with my smart contract.

All the information is displayed as it would appear on the blockchain. This is a nice by-product of building on a public infrastructure, Ethereum. 😊 https://t.co/FKTuJduuDD https://t.co/ko5ITtK7RZ

The movie streams flawlessly (just like Netflix).

This is a huge achievement for decentralized cinema in terms of distribution. The @calladitafilm NFT allowed me to access and play the movie at home.

Thank you, @miguelfaus. You've kept your promise to all of your early backers. https://t.co/HNTI0Zty19

artifacts.title: New receipt from 2023-05-05
artifacts.excerpt:
This makes me want to get onboard abd start using the @zapper_fi app. 
Love all of the new features.

Onchain activity becomes human-readable and social interactions are facilitated by simply-labelled transactions.

Great user/wallet-defined social feed. 
Thank you team Zapper! https://t.co/PTgQMI23Y8
